chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The Laudation before the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/64)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/64)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَدْعُوَ فَمَجِّدِ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ احْمَدْهُ وَ سَبِّحْهُ وَ هَلِّلْهُ وَ أَثْنِ عَلَيْهِ وَ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَ آلِهِ ثُمَّ سَلْ تُعْطَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Hammad Bin usman, from Al Haris Bin Al Mugheira who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Whenever you intend to supplicate, so Glorify Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic and Praise Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and Glorify Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and Extol Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and Laud upon Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and send Blessings upon Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> Progeny<sup>asws</sup>, then ask, you would be Given’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu’alla ibn Muhammad from al- Hassan ibn Ali from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from al-Harith ibn al-Mughirah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whenever you wish to pray and plead before Allah for help, speak of the glory of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, thank Him, speak of His Holiness, and say that no one deserves to be worshipped except Him, praise Him and ask from Him favors for Muhammad and his family and then ask Him for help, you will receive it.’”
